summary: Phase 7 Modules (Bookings, Settings, Billing) testing completed. All 24 backend API tests passed. Fixed a bug in team management feature check (team_seats -> max_team_seats).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: routes/settings.py had incorrect feature check - was checking 'team_seats' but actual feature key is 'max_team_seats'. Fixed in lines 130 and 161.
Phase 7 extraction follows Strangler Fig pattern correctly with proper service injection via set_services()
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id using {'_id': 0} projection
User isolation is properly enforced - users can only access their own bookings and account usage
Settings endpoints (GET/PUT /api/settings) work without authentication - may want to add auth for PUT
Packs endpoint (GET /api/packs) returns all subscription plans and credit packs correctly
Billing endpoints handle Stripe not configured gracefully (returns 503 or empty data)
Team management correctly checks max_team_seats > 0 for access control
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 modules (Bookings, Settings, Billing) fully tested. Feature flags USE_NEW_BOOKINGS_ROUTES=true, USE_NEW_SETTINGS_ROUTES=true, USE_NEW_BILLING_ROUTES=true are enabled. Fixed bug in team management feature check (was checking 'team_seats' but should be 'max_team_seats'). All READ operations tested: settings, packs, account usage, bookings, subscription features, current subscription, invoices, team members. User isolation verified. Note: freetrial@test.com and test_starter_1ea49b76@example.com credentials are invalid - use test_user_b@example.com for free tier testing.

tests: Creates default settings if none exist
Returns subscription_plans, lead_packs, call_packs, combo_packs, topup_packs, prepay_discounts
Returns empty list if no Stripe customer
Returns team members for unlimited tier
Free tier with max_team_seats=1 has access
Users only see their own bookings
Users only see their own account usage

team_seats_feature_check.issue: Feature check was using 'team_seats' but actual feature key is 'max_team_seats'

not_tested.POST /api/bookings: Requires qualified lead and agent with calendly_link - complex setup
